 {"id":"bd-24du","title":"[10.19] Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior.","description":"Master Plan Source: PLAN_TO_CREATE_FRANKEN_NODE.md
Section: 10.19 — Adversarial Trust Commons Execution Track (9M)

Why This Exists:
ATC federated intelligence track for privacy-preserving cross-deployment threat learning, robust aggregation, and verifier-backed trust metrics.

Task Objective:
Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior.

Acceptance Criteria:
- Federation outage or partition triggers deterministic fallback policy; local risk controls remain functional; rejoin/reconciliation is audited.

Expected Artifacts:
- `docs/specs/atc_degraded_mode.md`, `tests/integration/atc_partition_fallback.rs`, `artifacts/10.19/atc_degraded_mode_events.jsonl`.

- Machine-readable verification artifact at `artifacts/section_10_19/bd-24du/verification_evidence.json` for CI/release gating.
- Human-readable verification summary at `artifacts/section_10_19/bd-24du/verification_summary.md` linking implementation intent to measured outcomes.
Testing & Logging Requirements:
- Unit tests for core logic, invariants, and error handling.
- Integration/E2E tests for end-to-end control-flow behavior.
- Detailed structured logs/telemetry with stable codes and trace correlation IDs.
- Deterministic replay fixture or reproducible artifact for failure analysis.

Task-Specific Clarification:
- For "[10.19] Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior.", preserve full capability scope from the plan; no feature compression or silent omission is allowed.
- Verification for "[10.19] Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior." must include capability-specific thresholds and machine-readable pass/fail evidence artifacts.
- Unit tests, integration/E2E scripts, and structured logs for "[10.19] Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior." must support deterministic replay and root-cause triage without hidden context.

Why This Improves User Outcomes:
- "[10.19] Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior." is required to reduce operator error, increase deterministic safety guarantees, and improve time-to-diagnosis for failures in real-world workflows.
- Explicit success/failure evidence for "[10.19] Define ATC degraded/offline modes and local-first fallback behavior." prevents false confidence and improves trust in migration/compatibility/security outcomes.

Reservations released; bead remains blocked on upstream parser/AST migration + timeout pressure.","created_at":"2026-03-03T02:35:24Z"},{"id":32,"issue_id":"bd-24h7","author":"SunnyBridge","text":"Ran remote validation via `rch exec -- env CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch_target_sunnybridge cargo check -p frankenengine-engine --all-targets` from `/data/projects/franken_engine`.

Observed concrete compile blocker:
- `error[E0689]` in `crates/franken-engine/src/runtime_diagnostics_cli.rs:1318`
- Failing expression: `baseline_risk_millionths.saturating_add(signal_risk_millionths)`
- Root cause: `baseline_risk_millionths` inferred as ambiguous default integer while `signal_risk_millionths` is `u64`.

Minimal corrective patch:
```rust
let baseline_risk_millionths: u64 = match input.preflight.verdict {
    PreflightVerdict::Green => 100_000,
    PreflightVerdict::Yellow => 400_000,
    PreflightVerdict::Red => 700_000,
};
```

Coordination note:
- I attempted to reserve this file in `/data/projects/franken_engine` via Agent Mail, but it is exclusively reserved by `BlackCat`, so I did not edit to avoid overlap.
- Shared this failure + patch suggestion with both `RainyWolf` (franken_node thread `br-24h7`) and `BlackCat` (franken_engine thread `bd-24h7`).

Operational note:
- The remote build job was cancelled after error capture to avoid holding worker capacity (`rch cancel 29737366419669107`).
